def factorization(n): arr = defaultdict(int) temp = n for i in range(2, int(-(-n ** 0.5 // 1)) + 1): if temp % i == 0: cnt = 0 while temp % i == 0: cnt += 1 temp //= i arr[i] = cnt if temp != 1: arr[temp] = 1 if arr == []: arr[n] = 1 return arr
